abort.migrated_to_groups: The Min/Max helper has been migrated to use group sensors. Please use the group helper instead.

user.description: Min/Max helper has been deprecated, please use the group helper instead.
user.title: [%key:component::min_max::title%]

abort.entity_not_found: Entity could not be found, please restart repairing the issue.

migrate.description: The Min/Max helper has been deprecated and {title} will be migrated to a group sensor when you click submit to fix this repair.
migrate.title: [%key:component::min_max::issues::migrate_to_group_sensor::title%]

yaml_deprecated.description:
The Min/Max helper has been deprecated and you should use group sensors instead.

Replace your Min/Max YAML configuration with this converted configuration:
{yaml_config}

Once you have replaced your YAML configuration, restart Home Assistant to use the group helper instead.

The Group helper has more configuration possibilities. Refer to the documentation by clicking Learn More.
yaml_deprecated.title: [%key:component::min_max::issues::migrate_to_group_sensor::title%]

data_description.round_digits: Controls the number of decimal digits in the output when the statistics characteristic is mean, median or sum.

reload.description: Reloads min/max sensors from the YAML-configuration.
reload.name: Reload min/max sensors

title: Combine the state of several sensors
